sentences.arabic: زَادَتْ دَرَجَاتُ الحَرَارَةِ فِي العَالَمِ بِشَكْلٍ كَبِيرٍ.
sentences.translation: Temperature u svijetu su se značajno povećale.

sentences.arabic: هَذَا التَّغَيُّرُ يُؤَثِّرُ عَلَى الغَابَاتِ وَالحَيَوَانَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Ova promjena utječe na šume i životinje.
sentences.translationEn: This change affects forests and animals.

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ عَلَى الدُّوَلِ أَنْ تَعْمَلَ مَعًا لِحِمَايَةِ البِيئَةِ.
sentences.translation: Države moraju raditi zajedno kako bi zaštitile okoliš.
sentences.translationEn: Countries must work together to protect the environment.

sentences.translation: Ljudi sade drveće kako bi smanjili zagađenje.
sentences.translationEn: People are planting trees to reduce pollution.

sentences.arabic: نَحْنُ نَحْتَاجُ إِلَى هَوَاءٍ نَقِيٍّ لِنَعِيشَ بِصِحَّةٍ جَيِّدَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Trebamo čist zrak da bismo živjeli zdravo.
sentences.translationEn: We need clean air to live healthily.
